description.en: A tiny, rabbit-like mammal with a 「teddy bear」 face discovered in the Tianshan Mountains.
description.zh: 一种在天山山脉发现的小型哺乳动物，长着像「泰迪熊」一样的脸，外形像兔子。

anatomy.en: They are about 20 centimeters long with large ears and gray fur with rusty spots. They are very elusive and rare.
anatomy.zh: 它们长约 20 厘米，有大大的耳朵，灰色的皮毛上带有铁锈色斑点。它们非常神秘且罕见。

ecology_and_behavior.en: They live in rock crevices at very high altitudes and eat herbs and grasses. They are sensitive to climate change.
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 它们生活在高海拔的岩石缝隙中，以草本植物为食。它们对气候变化非常敏感。

habitat_and_distribution.en: Endemic to the Tianshan Mountains in northwest China, living on steep cliffs.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 中国西北天山山脉特有，生活在陡峭的悬崖上。
